title: Long Term Investment
definition: The selfless cooperation among individuals for mutual long-term benefits.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A group of friends that work together to help each other get what they want, even if it takes years.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A social behavior characterized by cooperation and mutual support for long-term benefits among individuals.
difficulty_levels.expert: This concept explores the cooperative behavior of certain species that fosters selflessness and patience over immediate rewards.

extra_fields.insight: The understanding of a powerful social dynamic based on long-term investment and cooperation.
